pullRequest.title: Add support for Django 5.2, as well as test against 5.2
pullRequest.body:
Similar change to https://github.com/jazzband/django-pipeline/pull/835 to handle the fact [that in Django 5.2](https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/dev/releases/5.2/#id2), there is now a `find_all` keyword argument to the `django.contrib.staticfiles.finders.find()` function.

This also adds tests against Django 5.2 to ensure this will continue to work going forward.

Fixes https://github.com/jazzband/django-pipeline/issues/834
Fixes https://github.com/jazzband/django-pipeline/pull/835
